positive: A vibrant, stylized minimalist illustration of a majestic owl perched on a geometric crescent moon, surrounded by constellations and stylized abstract leaves. The composition is perfectly centered, featuring clean, strong silhouettes with high contrast between the black, indigo, and burnt orange color palette. Use a fine linework style mixed with flat graphic design elements, evoking a cosmic forest aesthetic. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Ultra-detailed, vectorial art, clean edges, symmetrical composition, deep space glow, vibrant saturation.
